title: CGM Eligibility Question — Poor Handling
scenario: Customer asks about CGM coverage. Agent is vague, unsure, and pushes the customer away without a clear path forward.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Hi, I wanted to see if I could get a continuous glucose monitor.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: You'd have to check with your insurance.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Well my doctor said you supply them.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: We do but whether it's covered is up to your insurance.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Can you tell me what I need to do to get one?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Then you send it to us I guess. I'm not sure about all the details.
